title: The location of a trapezoid (located figures + hand-drawn web)
restrictions: Interpretation reviewed & chosen with the user: FIGURE + HAND-DRAWN LOCATION WEB, and MULTIPLE FIGURES (leaning toward #274). New `locatedFigures` generator: several irregular trapezoids placed asymmetrically, each fixed by a not-straight 'location web' of lines from the NEAREST architectural anchor points (corners / edge midpoints / centre) to its vertices. Executed through the governing organic lens — asymmetric placement, hand-skewed irregular figures, every line not-straight. Monochrome black on white. Density is CAPPED (each figure links only to its nearest few anchors, each anchor to its nearest few vertices) so no corner/anchor saturates — honoring the R15 paper-rip limit. The 16 span figure COUNT (3->8), figure SIZE, web RICHNESS (anchorsPerFigure / vertsPerAnchor / anchor set), and HAND energy (jitter 3-5).
